name: Grilled Lemon Pepper Chicken Breasts with Thyme Gremolata
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, whisk together the lemon juice, pepper, and salt to taste. Gradually add the olive oil, whisking until the marinade is emulsified.
2. Using a rolling pin or the smooth side of a meat pounder, flatten each chicken breast to a thickness of 1/4 inch between sheets of plastic wrap.
3. Place the flattened chicken breasts in a large resealable plastic bag and pour the remaining marinade over them. Chill for 30 minutes.
4. Prepare the grill by heating it to medium-high heat.
5. Remove the chicken from the marinade, allowing excess to drip off.
6. Grill the chicken on an oiled rack set 5 to 6 inches over the glowing coals until just cooked through, about 2 minutes per side.
7. Sprinkle each chicken breast with gremolata and garnish with lemon slices and thyme sprigs before serving.
8. Yield: 6 servings
